name: tockPurchasedFee
description: tockPurchasedFee schema from Tock Reservation Model

id.description: A unique identifier for the fee. Used internally by Tock.

name.description: The name assigned in the Tock Dashboard to this additional fee.

amountCents.description: The amount added to the total price for this additional fee.

posSku.description: If assigned by the business from the Tock Dashboard, this field will be the SKU denoting the fee.
